message:
test: add mutation event issueID verification for handleSimpleStoreOp callers (bd-1)

Adds TestHandleSimpleStoreOp_MutationIssueID which verifies that
handleDepRemove, handleLabelAdd, and handleLabelRemove emit mutation
events with the correct (non-empty) issueID after the closure-based
fix in a96df5ab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
